summary: Verified all source changes (Phases 1–3) were already committed on branch chore/add_testimonials_7_11 in commit 9dc94a1.
Confirmed Testimonials.astro now contains 10 testimonial entries (1, 2, 3, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11 — 4 intentionally absent) referencing i18n keys and Firebase photo URLs.
Confirmed es.ts, en.ts, and zh.ts all contain keys testimonials.7–11.{name,location,text} in parity across all three locales.
Testimonial 11 (Lucas Tanaka / Brasil) correctly reuses the same Firebase photo URL as testimonial 7 (client-specified).
James O'Connor apostrophe is correctly escaped as \' in single-quoted TypeScript string literals in en.ts and zh.ts.
Ran npm install to restore node_modules, then ran npm run build — build completed successfully with 0 errors and 0 @astrojs/check warnings.
All 7 pages built: /, /en/, /zh/, /privacidad/, /en/privacy/, /zh/privacy/, /404.html, plus redirect routes /globalrescue, /pire, /en/pire.
No new npm dependencies were added.
No new routes introduced; feature surfaces automatically via existing carousel .map() loop on all three locale home pages.
